---
title: "tiffany le"
subtitle: ""
image: profile.png

about:
  id: about
  template: solana
  image-shape: rounded
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/tiffany-n-le/
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/tiffanynle
    - icon: mastodon
      text: Mastodon
      href: https://mathstodon.xyz/@tiffanynle
    - icon: envelope-fill
      text: Email
      href: mailto:tiffanynle.cs@gmail.com
---

::: {#about}
hey, hi, welcome.
i like to mess with things (code and math, mostly).
sometimes i may post some of my [notes](/notes.qmd) and [writings](/posts.qmd) on those things here.

you can reach me by email or discord `@tiffanynle`.
:::
